storyInfo: The swordsman loses his sword, but meets someone after his own heart—the one whom Lin Qingyan is chasing for the theft of the tome. Thunder breaks the woman's geisthood, and it turns out the swordsman never lost his sword, after all.

attributes.content: It's already a new day, sir.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Yes, I know.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: Did you get stood up by whoever you were planning to meet?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Perhaps she was delayed.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: You can wait, but I'll be closing shop.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I'll leave, if I'm in your way.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: But I'll still have to wait at the door... this is the place where we agreed to meet, after all.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: Oh, that's not what I meant! You can stay at your table. We've known each other for quite a while, after all.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I was a humble waiter when we first met. Now I'm the keeper of this teahouse.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: You're a weird one, you know, a lone swordsman, coming over every year from... I forgot, are you from Jiangqi or Yumen?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I don't stay in one place. The four corners are my home.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: But I remember that you come here to this tea house in this little town every autumn to meet someone... how many years has it been?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Seven.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: Seven years... all you do when you meet is have a cup of tea, have a little chat. You're neither friends nor lovers; you don't even know her name, do you?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: We promised not to pry into each other's matters.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: Strange things indeed...
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Who exactly is this person you're waiting for, anyway?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I don't know.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: I've dealt with many people in my time... good, bad, wise, foolish, they're not so hard to understand at the end of the day.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: But she's the only one whom I've never figured out.
attributes.name: Drinking Swordsman

attributes.content: Your sword just knocked over my tea, young lady.
It's rather cramped in here. You should put away that sword of yours.
It's just a cup of tea. I'll pay for it.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: In fact, I'll buy you a jug of wine, and call you my friend.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: And you can teach your new friend how to use a sword.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Me? Haha...
You're talking to the wrong guy. I'm no swordsman, just an ordinary merchant delivering some goods to the City of Dusk, stopping by this town for a cup of tea.
I don't even have a sword on me. What kind of swordsman doesn't carry a sword?
Don't play the fool with me. I won't let you go until you say yes.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Wh-Why would you cut the table in half like that? You're scaring the other guests...
attributes.name: Flustered Waiter

attributes.content: Shut up.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I'll pay for it later. Don't interrupt my chat with my friend.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Say any more, and I'll cut you in half too.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: A-Alright...
attributes.name: Flustered Waiter

attributes.content: ...That's not very reasonable, is it?
What point is there in being reasonable? Better to roam free in the jianghu.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: But one needs plenty of skill to roam free.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I know you're a master of the sword. I want to learn from you.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: *sigh*...
You came a little too late.
I lost my sword...
...The moment it disappeared, I vowed to retire from the jianghu.
You lost your sword?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I lost it.
When?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Last night.
I stopped by this time for the night. It was gone when I woke up in the morning.
It just disappeared without a trace. No thief ever came, nor could they have taken anything from me if they did.
What kind of sword was it?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: A good one.
One who was by my side for many years. Without it, my business would not have prospered so much, nor would I have had the fame that I enjoy in the jianghu.
Why don't you look for it, if it's so important?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: On the contrary, I can't look for it.
Why?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: For so many years, I've used the sword, washed it, used it again. Nightmares and waking up from them... it seemed like there was nothing else in my life.
The sword does not remember the blood that it has tasted, but I can never shake the sin... perhaps losing my sword was a sign from Heaven.

I will rid myself of the sword and the status it brought me. Perhaps I'll change my face and name, and find a quiet place to live out the rest of my days... I'll leave the jianghu and bid farewell to my life before.
That's why I can't teach you.

The tidings of fate have brought us together in this tiny teahouse. If you don't mind me being a busybody, I have a word of advice for you... don't learn the ways of the sword, and cut all ties with the jianghu.
You can't rid yourself of it.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Why?
You're lying.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You're tired of the killing, of the constant cycle of revenge, but you could never let go of the freedom, of the days when you loved and hated as you pleased.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You just wanted an excuse to quit. Losing your sword gave you a convenient one.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You're talking like you know me...
Shall we make a bet? We'll see each other again in this very same tea house, same time next year.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Go and live a year without your sword, as you intend.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: If you feel happier, I won't bother you again, nor ask you to teach me your swordsmanship.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I can learn it, whether you teach me or not.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Hah... sure. It's a bet.
I may or may not teach you the sword, but I'll buy you a drink the next time we meet.
You're here already... why don't you go in?
No hurry. There's plenty of space.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Huh?
I've been studying the sword every day of the past year, and I've figured out a few moves. I'll show you.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You don't need to offer any advice, just watch.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Heh... sure.
Go ahead.
And that's it... duoxie.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Why do you thank me?
Without a master like you, I wouldn't know which moves should be polished, and which moves should be scrapped.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I didn't need you to say anything. All I needed was your reaction.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Your face told me all I needed to know about which moves stand out, and which moves are flawed.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You said you didn't want to take up the sword again, but you looked like an inveterate drunkard who just saw a jug of wine. You can't hide it.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The jianghu is too dangerous for a simple one like you.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Haha, you're absolutely right.
Interesting... ouch—
Here, take this medicine.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I thought you would keep holding your pain.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The wound opened when I laughed.
What happened?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I was waylaid on my way out of Jiangqi, after delivering the last batch of goods for the season.
Enemies of yours?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Yeah.
A job that I took a few years ago... it was only after I killed the man that I realized he wasn't just an evil rich man. Many people had reason to thank him.
And reason to take revenge for him, even though they were not his kin.
They must have watched me for a long time. They finally dared to attack when they were sure that I had lost my sword, and I hadn't fought in a long time.
I barely escaped with my life to meet you here.
How many enemies came for your life in this past year?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Too many to remember.
And you just kept running?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: What was I supposed to do, let them kill me?
You could have killed those petty minions easily, sword or no sword.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: To what end? One can never truly kill all of one's enemies. Kill one, and you make another.
I'll just keep sinking deeper.
And what of it?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Isn't that what the jianghu is about? Live free and live without regret. If your sword-hand slows down and you fall to someone stronger, that's just how things are.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You've seen the best and worst of the jianghu. What's so bad about such a life?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Besides, is laying low and keeping your head down the rest of your life really the way you want to live?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I still think losing my sword was a sign from Heaven.
(Frowns without comment)
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Come in, friends.
attributes.name: Anxious Waiter

attributes.content: Your tea is ready. You should drink it before it gets cold.
attributes.name: Anxious Waiter

attributes.content: Let's go. You can leave once you've had your tea.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: But I just arrived...
My swordsmanship has improved greatly in the past year, but you haven't figured out how to live without the sword. I won the bet this year.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: See you again next year.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: ...Very well.
You're still alive.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: How have you been? I don't see many new wounds. Have your enemies grown fewer, or have you learned to run faster?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: 'Marking a boat to find a sword'? How could anyone be so stupid?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Although I've never seen a boat, nor the river, nor the sea.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: 'Lotus leaves as far as the eye could see, an endless green becoming one with the sky...' I wonder what it looks like.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: See you next year.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Hey!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Oh, there you are.
I got within two inches of you, and you didn't notice... I could have killed you easily, if I wanted to.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You still can.
Hmph. You were distracted by something else... what are you hiding?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Oh—
Notice, warrant, bounty...
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: 'Delivering Blade'... is it the name of you and your sword?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Yeah.
You keep talking about ridding yourself of your sword, getting away from the jianghu, then you commit all these crimes?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Not me. The Delivering Blade.
What do you mean?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The Delivering Blade, which had been quiet for so many years, has once again become active in recent months, leaving a trail in multiple nomadic cities, Jiangqi, Langyi, Shangshu, Lungmen...
Or should I say, a trail of blood.
I told you last year that medicinal herb harvests were poor across the board. I had a really tough year, trying to my debts settled with a few major clients...
You mean someone's stealing your name to do evil? Attempting to frame you directly, even?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: For twenty years I've worked for both the law and the underworld. There must be countless warrants and bounties on my head, but there's one thing I can be sure—
Whether they're trying to catch people's attention, or hide their true aim... the name of the Delivering Blade is convenient for them.
Which means the Delivering Blade can never escape the jianghu.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Funny, isn't it?
You're concerned?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: It's been six years since I lost my sword. This was a sign from Heaven for me to distance myself from all this... and I almost succeeded.
When I first set foot into the jianghu, I just wanted to make a living by the sword while doing a few good deeds along the way. But the further I went, the less my will was my own.
It's only now that I realize the jianghu is a vortex, a gigantic vortex, and there's only one way out of it—
Don't get sucked in, in the first place.
You're in pain.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I've never seen you like this before.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Is that so? Perhaps.
...Enough about me. What about you?
Me?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: ...It's true. You could have killed me if you wanted to, just now.
Your skills have improved tremendously over the last few years.
No secret tomes, no teacher, not even a sparring partner in this little town. You've come this far on your own talent alone...
You don't even feel surprised or confused about all that's happened to me. Your mental attainment, too, is far beyond the ordinary.
The first time we met, I tried to dissuade you from studying the sword, out of my own experiences alone. But perhaps...
Perhaps you're a true genius who belonged in the jianghu all along.
You should leave this town and see what lies outside.
You're right.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: It's something that I must do.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Young lady...
What is it?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Frankly, there aren't many who would be a match for you at this point. There's no need to linger in this tiny town. If you want to leave, you should.
We met each other by the tidings of fate. I would like to give you a present, if you'd take it—the name of the Delivering Blade.
Call yourself his student, even the Delivering Blade himself. I could even give you a token to prove it... the jianghu can be a treacherous place, after all, and it'll make life a lot easier for you.
You should go. Let's bring this annual meeting to an end.
It's not time yet.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: What?
I haven't found a way to leave this town... but I will, soon.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I don't understand...
You're not the only one who's being drawn into the vortex... see you next year.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Another four hours have passed. It's long past the appointed time, isn't it?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: She's never missed the time before.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: You're not going?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: L-Let me stay a little longer.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I suggest you don't wait anymore.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I knew there was something you wanted to say, keeper. Go ahead, say it.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: The woman you're waiting for is a killer who's committed multiple murders in these parts.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: The whole town's in an uproar. Nobody dares to go out, even in the light of day. Didn't you notice how few patrons were in here?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Finally, a Tianshi from the bureaus passed by here a little while back, she's now going after this woman.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: So... I don't think she's coming.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: She might be aloof and eccentric, but she's not evil...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: What happened?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: I heard she was looking for a secret tome meant to improve one's kung fu, or something else. I don't know the specifics.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: You know... I've been wondering about something.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Go on.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Her sword is unusual.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: As far as I know, there were no other martial artists in this town before.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: How could a girl who was born and raised here, a town isolated from everything, become so obsessed with the sword and jianghu?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: ...Born and raised here?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: No, she's not local. She just showed up one day, and no one knows what her name is, or where she came from.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Do you know when that was?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Let me think... about the same time that you first came.
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: ...I had just lost my sword then.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Wh-What's going on?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: Lin Qingyan, is it? Why do you keep coming for me?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Object of evil, submit and answer for your crimes.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: What do you think you know?!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I do have many questions. Why did the Grandmaster's Book of Kung Fu show up here, and why are you after it?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: But you won't answer them unless I take you in.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Enough talk. Do your worst—
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: You missed our appointment.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: I thought you had left.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: ...Zheng Chou, the Delivering Blade?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: I don't remember ever doing business with the Tianshi Bureaus.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Lin Qingyan of the Tianshi Bureaus. I read your files when I was working at the Judicial Review Office. It was a thick one. You have been quiet the last few years, though. I see you were hiding here.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: And so I end up finding a Judicial Official who knows about me in this place. What a joke, isn't it, trying to retire from the jianghu?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Are you in league with each other?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Didn't you hear him? He left the jianghu behind, trying to wash its stains from his hands these seven years.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: He has nothing to do with this secret tome or the entire incident.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: But he's trying to protect you.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Protect me? I don't need it.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Young lady...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Get out of the way. I can deal with her myself.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The swordsman does not move.
You finally got rid of your sword, of the identity that it gave you. You spent seven years putting your previous life to rest. There's no need to break your vow now...
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: We barely know each other.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: When we first met, you said... I could never rid myself of it.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: In fact, it's always been there by my side.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I lost my sword here. Then I met you, who seemed to be born to wield a sword, improving simply by observing my tiniest of reactions...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Of course you could. We were inseparable, once!
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: I don't know what happened, or why you're doing all this...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Hah. Now you realize. How slow of you.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Funny, isn't it, how you tried to give me the name 'Delivering Blade' when we met last year... when in fact that is exactly what I am.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: This is a strange town. There's a mysterious power in the air, causing inanimate objects to become sentient geists.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Teapots, fans, rocks... maybe half the people you see on the streets were once such trinkets.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I don't remember how we got separated, but I've looked like this from my first ever waking moment.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I looked for you, until I found you at the teahouse. You were drinking tea nonchalantly, not the slightest bit anxious. I came up to you and drew your attention, and you said...
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I lost my sword. It's a sign from Heaven.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Young lady, no, Delivering Blade, no, how should I call you...?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Don't get sentimental.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: A swordsman with blood on his hands wants to turn over a new leaf. That's not wrong. The grumpy Tianshi over there might even exclaim, 'There's no greater virtue.'
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: But there was one thing that I realized at the time—
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: This jianghu, which you've grown so tired of... I've seen it and walked it with you, but I've never experienced it myself.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I shall wield the sword and travel the jianghu—this time, under my own name!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: But Waregeists cannot leave this town.
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: I've tried many times. The river to the east, the bridge to the west... it's as though there's an invisible wall around the town, one that stops only the geists!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: That's why you said 'It's not time yet'...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: ...I knew it.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: You stole the Book of Kung Fu because you sought to break this barrier for geists through the Grandmaster's teachings.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Such strange affairs. You could not have known who the Grandmaster was, so why would you think his writings would have such power... someone is trying to manipulate geists into causing trouble.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Are you done with your deduction, Tianshi?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: I thought you might have been a geist, but I didn't expect you to have such a past with Zheng Chou, the Delivering Blade... yet it provides no reference for my judgment of your crimes.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: You must answer for the acts you committed in attempting to acquire the book.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Submit, or be annihilated in form and spirit by Lei Fa.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Submit?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The secret tome is already mine. Soon I'll discover its secret and leave this place... this place that I've been trying to get out of for seven years!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: No more swordbearer, no more sheath. What is there to stop the sword's edge?
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: The only way to stop it is to break it!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: If that's so...
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Thunder of heaven, heed my call.
Lin Qingyan's voice is soft, but it seems as though heaven and earth themselves heed her call. The sky suddenly darkens, dark clouds gather, and a bright arc of electricity forms on her palm.
Tianshi Lin, I don't know how things came to this, but... I can understand why she wanted to do what she did. There's no need to...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: She's my sword. I-I'll accept responsibility with her...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Begone!
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Fool!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: I can understand her desire for freedom.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: But violence is inherent in her nature as the Geist of a sword. It is likely that she cannot control herself anymore; the more intent her desire is, the more important it is that I stop her from putting even more innocent people in harm's way.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: As for you...
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: It was a good thing that you took the loss of your sword as a sign to distance yourself from the jianghu and its conflicts. But seven years have passed, and you have yet to fully retire from it.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Hatred and grudges are like snow falling in a valley, piling up deeper and deeper, but you could have freed yourself from it if you truly tried.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Maybe she was right... in your heart, did you really throw away your sword?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Enough talk. As both the Deputy Minister of the Judicial Review Office, and disciple of the Tianshi Bureaus—this thunder must strike!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: The clouds and thunder scatter. The sword-bearing woman is gone, and the skies are clear again.
A plain-bound book lies where she stood. The wind blows its cover open—
'Book of Kung Fu'.
(The one who stole the Book of Kung Fu from Yumen might be here in this town. What is this person planning?)
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: (No use thinking about it. I'll just retrieve the Book of Kung Fu for now...)
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: There you are!
attributes.name: Huai Tianpei

attributes.content: I've been looking for you!
attributes.name: Huai Tianpei

attributes.content: ...Huai Tianpei?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: There is only the swordsman left on the street.
He stands there in a daze, staring silently into space.
Such commotion... is something the matter?
attributes.name: Teahouse Keeper

attributes.content: I lost my sword.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: It's time to go...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Once a year... and never again.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Excuse me, sir...
Y-You're...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Do you know me?
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: I'm lost. I don't know how I got here. You're the first person to pass by in a while, and I wonder if you know the way.
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: (So that's what Tianshi Lin meant...)
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: In your heart, did you really throw away your sword?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: I don't know the answer.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: But what you're doing is heartless, Tianshi Lin.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Heartless, is it?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Are you still going to beg for mercy for her, even at this hour?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: We saw each other one day of the year for seven years. I thought I was the one guiding her, but it turns out it was the other way around.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: It's true, I was a fool. I had thrown away my sword, only to pick it up time and again.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: I don't know what I'm clinging to, or what I'm afraid of... maybe it's something I should figure out, in a remote village somewhere, or in a prison cell.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: I'll pay for all the damage she caused, then I'll turn myself in. Before that, though, please...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: (Frenzied muttering)
attributes.name: Sword-Bearing Woman

attributes.content: Look at her. She can't hear you anymore.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: She has engaged in too much violence to obtain the book. Malice will overcome her mind, even if the thunder of Heaven does not strike.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: But she will never truly be human, even if Lei Fa manages to rid her of geisthood.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: The living suffer much and think much. But the geists formed from inanimate objects are often simple of mind... it is difficult for them to truly become part of society.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Is it an act of kindness to bring them into this world, or an act of cruelty?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: (Perhaps you should beg the Tianshi Bureaus' forgiveness when all is said and done, Lin Qingyan...)
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Enough talk. As both the Deputy Minister of the Judicial Review Office, and disciple of the Tianshi Bureaus—this thunder must strike!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: What did you just say?
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: Don't you remember anything?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Remember what?
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: N-Never mind.
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: There's a town down this path. The Chidao's half a day's journey from there, which leads to many nomadic cities, Shangshu, Dahuang, Langyi...
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Where are you going?
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: Where do you want to go?
attributes.name: Swordsman

attributes.content: Forward.
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: I'm not in great health, but I want to see those places...
attributes.name: Woman With Lowered Brows

attributes.content: Perhaps we can travel together, for a while.
attributes.name: Swordsman
